_comment: Assuit surveys manifest. The 2 Assuit welcomes live in 'new sounds 6/'. Question/thanks audio is shared with Menia and copied from 'new sounds 5/' — the migration wrapper stages both folders into /app/prompts/assuit-surveys/ so the migration finds every file by basename.

surveys.name: استطلاع حل الشكاوى - أسيوط
surveys.description: Assuit Water & Sanitation — complaint-closure satisfaction survey (single yes/no question)

prompts.name: assuit_s1_complaint_resolved
prompts.reportLabelAr: هل تم حل الشكوى الخاصة بكم؟

campaign.name: Assuit - Complaint Resolution Survey
campaign.description: Outbound campaign for Assuit complaint-closure satisfaction survey

surveys.name: استطلاع رضا الخدمة - أسيوط
surveys.description: Assuit Water & Sanitation — service satisfaction survey (4 questions)

prompts.name: assuit_s2_q1_service_satisfaction
prompts.reportLabelAr: ما مدى رضاك عن الخدمة المقدمة؟ (1-5)

prompts.name: assuit_s2_q2_rep_professionalism
prompts.reportLabelAr: ما مدى تقييمكم لاحترافية ممثل خدمة العملاء؟ (1-5)

prompts.name: assuit_s2_q3_service_time
prompts.reportLabelEn: Did the service take an appropriate time?

prompts.name: assuit_s2_q4_multiple_contacts
prompts.reportLabelAr: هل احتجت إلى التواصل أكثر من مرة لحل المشكلة؟
prompts.reportLabelEn: Did you need to contact more than once?

campaign.name: Assuit - Service Satisfaction Survey
campaign.description: Outbound campaign for Assuit service satisfaction (4-question) survey
